sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71199" key="nuktilaqraiofa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτῐ-λαθραιοφάγος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[φᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71199.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating secretly by night,</tr_> Epigr. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> </bibl> I.</sense> </entryFree>
